phrases.intent_en: Can I rent an audio guide here
phrases.text_local: Můžu si tady půjčit audio průvodce?
phrases.cultural_note: Czech staff often give a minimal 'Ano' with a location pointer, assuming the tourist will go there next.

phrases.intent_en: Is Hradisko a separate admission fee
phrases.cultural_note: Czech staff often confirm with 'Ano' and then state the fact directly without elaboration.

phrases.intent_en: Where is the ticket desk at Denisova entrance
phrases.text_local: Kde je pokladna u vchodu z Denisovy?
phrases.cultural_note: Czech directional answers often use 'po pravé/levé straně' (on the right/left side) rather than just 'vpravo/vlevo'.

likely_response.local: Hned za vchodem, po pravé straně.
likely_response.translation_en: Just past the entrance, on the right side.

responses.english: Just past the entrance, on the right side.
responses.french: Hned za vchodem, po pravé straně.

phrases.intent_en: Where is the gift shop for art books
phrases.text_local: Kde je obchod s uměleckými knihami?
phrases.cultural_note: Museum gift shops are often near the cloakroom (šatna) or exit in Czech museums.

likely_response.translation_en: On the ground floor, next to the cloakroom.

responses.english: On the ground floor, next to the cloakroom.
